title: Midnight Caper
description: A midnight craving dish featuring a blend of clotted cream and a marinated blend that captures the essence of a spicy and creamy Tunisian flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Marinade (e.g., Herbes de Provence, Lemon Zest)

instructions: Melt the clotted cream in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes to the melted cream. Stir until fragrant.
Stir in olive oil, marinade, chicken broth or water. Bring to simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low and let simmer for about 5 minutes to blend flavors.
Remove from heat and add chopped fresh herbs. Mix well to combine.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
